sentences.arabic: شُرْبُ الْمَاءِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِصِحَّةِ الْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Pijenje vode je veoma važno za zdravlje tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Drinking water is very important for the health of the body.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِشُرْبِ ثَمَانِيَةِ أَكْوَابٍ مِنَ الْمَاءِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju pijenje osam čaša vode svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend drinking eight glasses of water every day.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الْمَاءُ فِي تَحْسِينِ الْهَضْمِ وَنَضَارَةِ الْبَشَرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Voda pomaže u poboljšanju probave i svježini kože.
sentences.translationEn: Water helps in improving digestion and skin radiance.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَحْمِلَ زُجَاجَةَ مَاءٍ مَعَنَا دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Uvijek trebamo nositi flašu vode sa sobom.
sentences.translationEn: We must always carry a water bottle with us.
